   "reasoning": "I'm fed up with the current system, to be honest. We need to prioritize the students who are actually willing to learn, not just scrape by. I think we should focus on incentivizing good teachers to stay and reallocating resources to actually support students like me who are trying to get into IIT-JEE or NEET. Transparency reports are a no-brainer - how can we expect to improve if we don't even know what's working?",
